entities.name: AGRICULTURAL WATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Interventions designed to manage water resources for sustainable agriculture and climate risk mitigation

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The production of food in a way that is environmentally sustainable and ensures long-term food security

entities.name: CLIMATE RISKS
entities.description: Potential negative impacts resulting from climate variability and change

entities.name: WESTERN INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the study on rainwater harvesting was conducted

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER ASSESSMENT TOOL
entities.description: A predictive model used to simulate the impact of land management practices on water, sediment, and chemical yields

entities.name: SURFACE RUNOFF
entities.description: Water from precipitation that flows over the land surface rather than infiltrating into the soil

entities.name: SOIL LOSS
entities.description: The removal of the top layer of soil from the land surface, often due to erosion

entities.name: RESERVOIR STORAGE LEVELS
entities.description: The volume of water held within reservoir structures

entities.name: GROUNDWATER RECHARGE
entities.description: The process where water moves downward from surface water to groundwater

entities.name: MONSOON SEASON
entities.description: The seasonal period of heavy rainfall in South Asia

entities.name: GROUNDWATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of groundwater accessible for extraction and use

entities.name: CROP INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the number of crops grown per unit area per year

entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: The wearing away of topsoil by natural physical forces such as water and wind

entities.name: HORTICULTURE
entities.description: High-value garden crops including fruits and ornamental plants

entities.name: VEGETABLES
entities.description: Herbaceous plants grown for consumption

entities.name: FODDER
entities.description: Agricultural plants grown specifically to be used as livestock feed

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD INCOME
entities.description: The total income received by a household from all sources

entities.name: DOWNSTREAM WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water available in the lower reaches of a watershed

entities.name: BASE FLOW
entities.description: The portion of streamflow that is sustained by groundwater seepage

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT GOALS
entities.description: Global objectives aimed at achieving a sustainable future for all
